hero.name: devcy0922
hero.headline: 10-Year Engineer Expanding Backend Operations Experience into AI Platforms
hero.tagline: Designing authentication, policy, audit, and data isolation boundaries for AI systems, leveraging enterprise backend and infrastructure operations experience.
hero.context: For 10 years, I have handled legacy system modernization, external system integration, SSO and permission management, CI/CD, and operations automation. Currently, I am expanding this experience into AI Gateway, Agent Security, and RAG Isolation projects.
home.stats.label: Career & Project Summary
home.experience.label: 10 Years of Professional Experience
home.experience.title: Experience Operating Enterprise Systems
home.experience.desc: I have addressed authentication, integration, deployment, and operations challenges in enterprise systems long before AI projects. My current platform design is rooted in this experience.
home.experience.backend.title: Enterprise Backend
home.experience.backend.desc: Designed and operated legacy system modernization, B2B backends, and external API & data integrations.
home.experience.identity.title: Authentication, Authorization & Audit
home.experience.identity.desc: Managed SSO, role-based access control, key management, and traceable audit events.
home.experience.operations.title: Deployment & Operations Automation
home.experience.operations.desc: Standardized Docker and CI/CD, managed AWS operations, and performed Redis troubleshooting & root cause analysis.
home.projects.label: Featured Projects
home.projects.title: Work Extended to AI Platforms
home.projects.desc: Three representative projects covering Gateway, security boundaries, and RAG isolation. Each document outlines the implementation scope and current limitations.
home.demo.label: Executable Evidence
home.demo.title: Inspect AI Request Boundaries Hands-On.
home.demo.desc: The Runtime Demo walks you through how public requests pass authentication and policy checks, reach a private LLM, and leave audit signals.
path.caption: From Request Ingestion to Operations Audit
path.boundary: Each step re-validates credentials and tenant scope, ensuring operational secrets and internal Model IDs are never exposed on public screens.
capability.boundary.title: Multi-Tenant Request Boundaries
capability.boundary.desc: Enforces authentication, authorization, quotas, and data scope per request.
capability.delivery.title: Verifiable Delivery Pipeline
capability.delivery.desc: Controls change risk through IaC, security regression testing, and deployment automation.
capability.runtime.title: Observable AI Runtime
capability.runtime.desc: Connects routing, inference, and audit events into a single operational flow.
career.title: Connecting Long-Standing Operations Challenges to AI Request Boundaries.
career.desc: I treat AI projects not as isolated trends, but as an evolution of enterprise systems. I redesign recurring authentication, deployment, audit, and integration challenges for the generative AI era.
career.identity.title: Authentication & Authorization
career.identity.desc: Extends enterprise SSO and permission system experience to Project Principal, Model Policy, and Tool permissions.
career.delivery.title: Deployment & Execution Standardization
career.delivery.desc: Applies CI/CD, Docker, and AWS operations experience to reproducible AI service deployment and security regression validation.
career.operations.title: Audit & Legacy Integration
career.operations.desc: Transforms audit response, key management, and external API/data integration experience into traceable request flows and isolation boundaries.
career.destination: Policy, Isolation & Audit Boundaries of the GoVail AI Platform
section.selectedSystems.desc: Positioning GoVail as the core system, Aegis-LLM, Aperture MCP, and SliceRAG are distinguished as key components. The AgentSecOps Playground validates these boundaries together.
system.platform.label: Core System · PLATFORM
system.core.label: Verifiable Core Components
system.validation.label: Integrated Validation
lab.intro.title: Showcasing Execution Paths Before Explanations.
lab.intro.desc: In the Live Lab below, click runtime nodes to inspect contract and failure boundaries, and observe how actual private LLM requests flow from policy checks to response auditing.
lab.intro.evidence: View Security Invariants & Failure Bypass E2E Evidence
project.govail.title: GoVail Gateway
project.govail.desc: A Rust Gateway handling authentication, policy, routing, and auditing at the front of private LLM calls.
project.aegis.title: Aegis-LLM
project.aegis.desc: A Rust Control Plane handling LLM request authentication, DLP, Prompt Security, and Fallback.
project.slicerag.title: SliceRAG
project.slicerag.desc: A RAG Data Plane that stores and retrieves documents strictly within project_id scopes.
project.agentsecops.title: AgentSecOps
project.agentsecops.desc: An E2E Harness validating security failure paths across the Gateway, RAG, and Mock LLM.
project.aperture.title: Aperture-MCP
project.aperture.desc: A Rust Policy Proxy that inspects and blocks MCP tools/calls before execution.
project.lingo.title: LingoAgent
project.lingo.desc: This page's translation was performed by LingoAgent. It's an automated pipeline: ko.json change → LLM translation + ICU validation → GitHub Action auto-commit.
lingo.banner.title: Translated by LingoAgent
lingo.banner.desc: The UI text on this page was automatically generated via the LingoAgent pipeline (ICU validation + LLM QA) using ko.json as the source.
